services.name: Deep Cleaning
services.description: Top-to-bottom deep clean: kitchen degrease, bathroom descale, dust extraction, floor scrub, balcony, interior windows.
benefits: Removes 99% of dust mites + allergens for healthier breathing
Brings back the 'just-moved-in' feel — gloss, shine, smell
Limescale + mineral build-up gone from sinks, taps, glass
Saves 4-6 hours of weekend you'd spend doing it yourself

process_steps.title: You book in 30 seconds
process_steps.desc: Tell Servia the size + date — instant quote.

process_steps.title: Top-to-bottom deep clean
process_steps.desc: 3-5 hrs. We treat your home like ours.

process_steps.title: Sign + pay digitally
process_steps.desc: Before the crew leaves. WhatsApp confirmation.

faqs.q: Do you bring your own supplies?
faqs.a: Yes — eco-friendly, MOH-approved chemicals + microfiber cloths + commercial vacuum. Tell us if you'd rather we use yours.

faqs.q: Will you move heavy furniture?
faqs.a: We move what 2 people can safely lift (sofas, dining chairs, beds). Heavy wardrobes stay put — we clean around and behind.

faqs.q: What if something gets damaged?
faqs.a: All Servia vendors are insured. Report within 24 hrs and we cover repair or replacement.

services.name: General Cleaning
services.description: Standard maintenance clean — dusting, mopping, bathrooms, kitchen wipe-down. Best for already-clean homes.
benefits: Keeps your home consistently fresh between deep cleans
Hand-back time: 1-2 hrs of your life back per visit
Same cleaner each time on weekly plans

process_steps.title: Rate + repeat
process_steps.desc: Save your fav cleaner for next time.

faqs.q: Difference vs deep cleaning?
faqs.a: General is the maintenance clean. Deep is for after months without cleaning, or first-time visit. Start with deep, then maintain with general.

services.name: Hourly Maid
services.description: Trained maid for housekeeping. Hourly basis, minimum 2 hours.
benefits: Pay by the hour — only what you need

process_steps.title: Pick hours
process_steps.desc: Min 2 hrs. Hourly rate, no hidden fees.

faqs.q: How much does Hourly Maid cost in UAE?
faqs.a: Hourly Maid starts from AED 35. Final price depends on the details you give us — use the calculator on this page to get an exact quote in 30 seconds. All prices include 5% VAT.

faqs.q: How long does hourly maid take?
faqs.a: Typically 2+ hours. Our crew: 1 trained maid. You'll see the expected duration on the booking confirmation.

faqs.q: What's included in Hourly Maid?
faqs.a: Includes: General cleaning; Laundry assistance; Ironing. All materials, tools and PPE are brought by our team. Excludes: Childcare; Elderly care.

faqs.q: Where do you cover and how fast can you arrive?
faqs.a: Servia covers all 7 UAE emirates. Same-day available across Dubai, Sharjah, Ajman and Abu Dhabi (usually within 2-4 hours). RAK, UAQ and Fujairah usually need 24-48h notice.

faqs.q: What's your guarantee?
faqs.a: 7-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with the hourly maid, message us within 24h (48h for paint/pest/disinfection) and we re-do it free of charge — no arguments, no fine print. AED 25,000 damage cover per booking.

faqs.q: How do I pay?
faqs.a: Advance payment confirms your slot. Pay via Apple Pay, Google Pay, Visa/Mastercard, or a WhatsApp link. We never see your card number — payment goes through a PCI-compliant gateway. Refundable per our refund policy.

services.name: Chauffeur / Personal Driver
services.description: On-demand and hourly chauffeur for airport runs, errands, school runs, business meetings — your car or ours.
excludes: Fuel and Salik / parking charges (added to invoice)
Vehicle (use yours, or add 'rental car' add-on)
benefits: Same driver on recurring routes (school run, daily commute)
Can hold a sign at airport pickup

process_steps.title: Driver assigned
process_steps.desc: You get name + photo + WhatsApp + live ETA.

process_steps.title: On-time pickup
process_steps.desc: Driver arrives 5 mins early. You ride.

process_steps.title: Pay after the ride
process_steps.desc: Hourly rate × hours + fuel/Salik. Tap to pay.

faqs.q: Can I book a chauffeur for the airport?
faqs.a: Yes — choose 'airport_pickup' or 'airport_dropoff'. Add the meet-and-greet add-on if you want the driver waiting with a sign at arrivals.

faqs.q: Hourly minimum?
faqs.a: 3 hours per booking. Multiple short trips can be combined under one hourly block.

faqs.q: Can I get the same driver every day?
faqs.a: Yes — set frequency to 'recurring' and we'll match the same driver wherever possible.

faqs.q: Female driver available?
faqs.a: Yes, on request. Mention 'female driver only' in the notes.
